title: Cave Mapping Expedition — Silent Sonar Profile
strategies: naive half-fill baseline (fill first half of passage uniformly) -> reproduces internal baseline B
uniform full-support profile (ping equally everywhere) -> C1 = 2.0, a clean simple improvement
seeded coordinate-descent local search from uniform, incremental autoconvolution updates -> C1 ~ 1.7
analytic tapers (smooth bumps, arcsine) which are actually WORSE than uniform (trap)
